hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ "$FILE" == */finance/app/src/*.ts || "$FILE" == */finance/app/src/*.tsx || "$FILE" == */finance/app/src/**/*.ts || "$FILE" == */finance/app/src/**/*.tsx ]] && cd /c/Users/mathe/http/finance/app && echo '--- lint ---' && bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -20 && echo '--- typecheck ---' && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
